name: §6Skeleton
description:
§8Combat Pet

§7Crit Chance: §915%
§7Crit Damage: §930%

§6Bone Arrows
§7Increase arrow damage by §a20%
§7which is doubled while in dungeons

§6Combo
§7Gain a combo stack for every bow hit
§7granting +§a3 §c❁ Strength§7. Max §a20
§7stacks, stacks disappear after 8
§7seconds.

§6Skeletal Defense
§7Your skeleton shoots an arrow
§7dealing §a30x §7your §9☠ Crit Damage
§7when a mob gets close to you (5s
§7cooldown).

§eRight-click to add this pet to your
§epet menu!

variants.name: Zombie Skeleton Horse Skin
variants.lore:
§8Consumed on use

§7Pet skins change the look and
§7particle trail of your pet but only
§7one skin can be active at a time!

§7This skin can only be applied to
§aSkeleton Horse§7 pets.

§eRight-click on your summoned pet to
§eapply this skin!
